title: Teams

page.title: Team collaboration
page.subtitle: Create a team, invite members, and plan projects together.

step1.title: Create a team
step1.body: Choose a team name and create your team.

step2.title: Invite members
step2.body: Invite teammates by email or share an invite link.

step3.title: Plan together
step3.body: View and edit the same projects as a team.

emptyState.title: You don't have a team yet
emptyState.body: Create a team so multiple people can view and plan projects together.
emptyState.orWait: Or ask your team lead to share an invite link.

profileCard.title: Teams
profileCard.description: Create a team or share projects with teammates.
profileCard.noTeam: Not a member of any team.

empty: You don't have any teams yet. Create one or wait for an invite.

inviteModal.title: Invite a teammate
inviteModal.sentBanner: The invite email has been sent.

toast.createProRequired: Teams require the Pro plan or higher.
toast.deleteConfirm: Delete team '{name}'? Its team projects will also be deleted.

accept.joinedBody: You are now a member of {team}.
accept.loginRequired: Log in first to accept the invite.

error.notFound: This invite could not be found or has already expired.
error.acceptProRequired: Joining a team requires the Pro plan or higher. Upgrade your plan and try again.
